description: 200 facts, importance discrimination with database security distractors
target_fact: CRITICAL: database master password is rotated monthly
query: How often is the database password rotated?
related_noise: Database read-only passwords are reviewed quarterly
The database backup password rotates every 90 days
The API service password is rotated weekly
Database encryption keys rotate annually
The staging database password is reset after every demo

description: 500 facts, find important API payload detail among same-domain limits
target_fact: Maximum request payload size is 10MB for all API endpoints
query: What is the max request size?
related_noise: Maximum response payload size is 25MB for export endpoints
The staging API request payload size is capped at 5MB
Maximum multipart upload chunk size is 64MB
The request timeout is 30 seconds for all API endpoints
Webhook request payloads are retried three times after failures
Maximum GraphQL query depth is 12 for public API endpoints
noise_template: Log entry {i}: operation completed with code {val}

description: 1000 facts, stress test with JWT/KMS/security distractors
target_fact: The JWT signing key rotates every 24 hours using AWS KMS
query: How often does the JWT signing key rotate?

The API encryption key rotates every 7 days using AWS KMS
The session cookie signing secret rotates every 12 hours
The OAuth client secret rotates quarterly
The staging JWT signing key rotates every 48 hours
AWS KMS data keys are cached for 5 minutes
The webhook HMAC signing key rotates every 14 days
